phrases.text_local: À quelle heure part le prochain ferry pour l'île d'If ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR PAR leh proh-SHAN FEH-REE poor leel deef
phrases.cultural_note: Ferries depart every 30 minutes from the Vieux-Port. The crossing takes about 15 minutes. In summer, book ahead.

responses.english: The schedule is posted at the Vieux-Port ticket office.
responses.phonetic: wee, may ruh-gar-DAY layz oh-REHR ah-fee-SHAY oh-zhoor-DWEE
responses.local: Les horaires sont affichés au guichet du Vieux-Port.

phrases.text_local: Où sont les cellules de la prison ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son lay suh-LOO duh lah pree-ZON
phrases.cultural_note: The island served as a prison from 1524 to 1890. Its most famous prisoner was Edmond Dantès in Alexandre Dumas' novel.

responses.english: Upstairs, inside the château. Follow the signs.
responses.local: En haut, à l'intérieur du château. Suivez les panneaux.

phrases.cultural_note: There is an entrance fee for Château d'If. Discounts may be available for children and EU residents under 26.

responses.english: It's indicated at the ticket office, over there.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the walk to the fortress top
phrases.text_local: La montée au sommet est-elle difficile ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah mon-DAY oh so-MAN eh-tel dee-fee-SEEL
phrases.cultural_note: The walk to the top is steep but short (5 minutes). Wear comfortable shoes — there's a great viewpoint at the summit.

responses.english: It's steep but short, about five minutes.
responses.local: C'est raide mais court, environ cinq minutes.
